title: pedicularis brachyodonta subsp. moesiaca
intro: Pedicularis brachyodonta subsp. moesiaca, also known as Balkan lousewort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the bumblebee flower family (Orobanchaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern European folk remedies, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Balkan lousewort include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Balkan lousewort is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
